examples: Nor should it: human knowledge is too precious to consign to the ether alone.
Under the consignment shop structure, Banks would consign only assets with doubtful values.
So the consigner can consign fake goods or the buyer can refuse to pay, leading to problems at all stages of the process.
Shortfalls in aid will consign the MDG project to failure at enormous human cost.
But here in this south-eastern corner of Korea, few people are ready to consign it to the past.
